theme: firefighting crews on a wildfire cell grid
title: Firebreak Dispatch on the Advancing Front
innovation_hook: Pre-position firebreaks on the deterministic future frontier implied by wind and fuel, spending commitment before the fire arrives.
strategies: do-nothing baseline: dispatch no crews; the fire burns everything it reaches within the horizon (evaluator's weak anchor, ~0.1)

flame-edge greedy (TRAP): wall the cells the front reaches soonest that are still buildable, dispatching every crew at t=0; in open terrain the fire streams around the short wall, funnels through the far chokepoint, and burns the town anyway

future-frontier gating (STRONG): simulate the fire forward to get arrival times and the shortest-path tree, score cells by the sub-tree value they gate (the ridge gap that guards the town gates the whole town), and pre-build breaks on those buildable chokepoints so they stand finished before the front arrives
headroom above strong: staggered dispatch to build more breaks than crews over time, exact min-cut sealing, and multi-gap value trade-offs the greedy gate-ranking does not fully optimize
